title: could oci images can  store image's tag in dir name  as same as dir format?
body:
when use dir format, the image tag will be a part of dir name.  but  when copy with  oci format  as dest, the dir name just has path. 

many thanks!!!

comments.body:
Thanks for your report.

Could you provide a reproducer with expected/actual outcomes, please? It’s not clear to me what you mean. (e.g. `dir:` has no concept of image names/tags at all.)

sorry , let me give a showcase.

the dir struct of `../bin/skopeo copy docker://registry:latest  dir:registry_dir:latest`
```
./registry_dir:latest
./registry_dir:latest/2e200967d166e26c5c1280d9c91730171fe9d635010144452329d3e3acb5ea72
./registry_dir:latest/52dc419b0ee22d1bb5f3b95a57b2edc733b7b585277f8101db7b2c9b53605c1b
./registry_dir:latest/b0a23bbf973dfc8463b219afb9e0cea48fbe4f675460b834a8436648ab396fd8
./registry_dir:latest/b6846b9db566bc2ea5e2b0056c49772152c9b7c8f06343efb1ef764b23bb9d96
./registry_dir:latest/c50f110701a7ffebc91efcdc34c1e78c90bf5358f3d70b7f933f58a7f7cbfc07
./registry_dir:latest/df9b9388f04ad6279a7410b85cedfdcb2208c0a003da7ab5613af71079148139
./registry_dir:latest/manifest.json
./registry_dir:latest/version
```


as dir format can use `image:tag` as dir name ,  then i can get the tag `latest` of image from dirname `registry_dir:latest`
but when oci format : `skopeo copy docker://registry:latest  oci:registry_oci:latest`, the dir struct:
```
registry_oci/
registry_oci/blobs
registry_oci/blobs/sha256
registry_oci/blobs/sha256/52dc419b0ee22d1bb5f3b95a57b2edc733b7b585277f8101db7b2c9b53605c1b
registry_oci/blobs/sha256/663e1c44f41e2ee3939df6f14c2d8396e775b9fc382282fce7b1edda7f6dca9a
registry_oci/blobs/sha256/b0a23bbf973dfc8463b219afb9e0cea48fbe4f675460b834a8436648ab396fd8
registry_oci/blobs/sha256/b6846b9db566bc2ea5e2b0056c49772152c9b7c8f06343efb1ef764b23bb9d96
registry_oci/blobs/sha256/c50f110701a7ffebc91efcdc34c1e78c90bf5358f3d70b7f933f58a7f7cbfc07
registry_oci/blobs/sha256/df69fde9e0a9e3970aa54f9f9917ccf04af9e4e4bf3095172966ac675d20c4d1
registry_oci/blobs/sha256/df9b9388f04ad6279a7410b85cedfdcb2208c0a003da7ab5613af71079148139
registry_oci/index.json
registry_oci/oci-layout
```
then i had to parse the `registry_oci/index.json` to get the image tags.

so how can oci format support the "image:tag" as dir name ??

many thanks

> so how can oci format support the "image:tag" as dir name ??

The syntax doesn’t allow that; the first `:` is always treated as an end of the path and start of the “reference” in https://github.com/containers/image/blob/main/docs/containers-transports.5.md#ocipathreference .

Ultimately, you can create a symlink that doesn’t contain a `:` pointing to the intended directory (making sure to create it first), and use that.

> 

ok , i got  thanks very much.
